control.description-key: Fishbone / Ishikawa cause-and-effect diagram. Click a bone to add root causes with votes and a Hypothesis/Confirmed/Rejected status; drag causes to reorder or move between bones.

property.name: causeData
property.description-key: JSON array of root causes: [{id, category, text, votes, status}]. Bind to a Multiple Lines of Text column or a canvas variable.

property.name: diagramCategories
property.description-key: JSON array (or comma-separated list) of category names. Defaults to Measurements, Materials, People, Environment, Methods, Machines.

property.name: problem
property.description-key: The effect (problem statement) shown in the fish head. Editable by clicking the head.

property.name: effectLabel
property.description-key: Heading shown at the top of the effect box. Default: Problem.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for all text.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour of the diagram (any CSS colour or hex). Also used as the PNG export background. Default white.

property.name: diagramColor
property.description-key: Colour of the spine, bones and head (any CSS colour or hex). Default black.

property.name: hypothesisColor
property.description-key: Colour for Hypothesis causes (any CSS colour or hex). Default yellow.

property.name: confirmedColor
property.description-key: Colour for Confirmed causes (any CSS colour or hex). Default green.

property.name: rejectedColor
property.description-key: Colour for Rejected causes (any CSS colour or hex). Default red.

property.name: readOnly
property.description-key: When true, disables all editing (view only).

property.name: pngExport
property.description-key: Read-only PNG snapshot of the diagram as a data URI. Use e.g. in an Image control or send to Power Automate to save a .png file.
